failed_attempts.sql:
WITH target_profile AS (SELECT profile_id FROM publication WHERE url LIKE '%fluminensefc%' AND description_lexemes @@ web_search_to_tsquery('english', 'torcedor')), membership_claims AS (
  SELECT p2.id AS profile_id, p1.profile_id
    FROM comment
             JOIN publication ON publication_id = id
             JOIN profile ON profile_id = id
    JOIN publication_collab pc ON pc.publication_id = id
             AND pc.profile_id = p2.id
  WHERE publication.description_lexemes @@ web_search_to_tsquery('english', 'fluminense')
                AND publication.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', '\+torcedor')
    ), profiles_might_be_members AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT p1.profile_id FROM target_profile tp JOIN profile p1 ON tp.profile_id = p1.id WHERE p1.biography LIKE '%torcedor%' OR p1.username LIKE '%torcedor%'
  )
SELECT mp1.profile_id
FROM profiles_might_be_members
JOIN membership_claims mc2 ON mc2.profile_id = mp1.profile_id
JOIN target_profile tp3 on tp3.profile_id ON mp1.profile_id JOIN profile_relationship AS pr ON pr.destination_profile_id = mp1.profile_id WHERE pr.edge = 'follows'
LIMIT 10;

  SELECT p2.id AS profile_id, p1.profile_id

    JOIN publication_collab pc ON pc.publication_id = id
             AND pc.profile_id = p2.id
  WHERE description_lexemes @@ web_search_to_tsquery('english', 'fluminense')
